app.name: MapleLink
announcement.title: Development Status & Parallel-Track Notice
announcement.intro: MapleLink is developed in parallel with the original Beanfun, to give players a more flexible choice. The two projects have distinct goals:
announcement.maplelink: Built purely for MapleStory players; a lightweight rewrite-from-scratch that serves as the proving ground for new tech experiments and fast triage of login issues.
announcement.beanfun: Aims to support all Gamania titles, with continued optimization and broad, high-compatibility coverage of the whole ecosystem.
announcement.more_info_link: About the parallel development of Beanfun and MapleLink (#323)
announcement.dismiss: I've read it — don't show again
login.title: Sign In
login.classic_hint: Sign in with a Hong Kong beanfun account; MapleStory Classic launches automatically.
login.check_ngm_missing: Nexon Game Manager not found — install the Classic client (which includes NGM) first.
login.classic_launched: MapleStory Classic started — switch to the game window
login.classic_launch_failed: Auto-launch failed. The Classic portal was opened so you can start it manually (Nexon Game Manager must be installed).
login.cafe_mode_hint: Erase every saved account, login session and setting on this PC when the app closes. For shared computers.
login.cafe_confirm_body: Once enabled, closing MapleLink permanently deletes every saved account, password, login session, setting and log on this PC. This cannot be undone. Enable it?
login.gamepass_instruction: Complete the login in the GamePass browser window
login.qr.title: QR Code Login
login.qr.instruction: Scan the QR code with the Beanfun app
login.qr.zoom_hint: Scroll to zoom · Click outside to close
login.totp.instruction: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
login.totp.title: Two-Step Verification
login.advance_check_repeat: beanfun requested repeated human verification — please try again later
login.accounts_load_failed: Logged in, but the game account list could not be loaded — press Refresh on the main page to retry
login.verify.title: Security Verification
login.verify.instruction: Enter your verification info and captcha code
login.verify.web_required: This account requires advanced verification in a browser. Click below to open the official site, complete verification, then return to login.
settings.title: Settings
settings.gamepass_incognito_desc: Don't save login session in GamePass browser
settings.skip_play_confirm_desc: Auto-close the game's Play button window and skip relaunch confirmation
settings.traditional_login_desc: Launch the game without passing server connection args. Disable this to pass server/port/account/OTP directly to the game.
settings.hide_account_names_desc: Blur account names / IDs in the account list and tabs so they aren't leaked in screenshots (hover to reveal).
settings.close_behavior_desc: What happens when you close the window; “Ask every time” shows a prompt on close.
close_dialog.title: Close MapleLink
close_dialog.message: Do you want to quit the app, or minimize it to the system tray (keep running in the background)?
close_dialog.remember: Remember my choice and don't ask again
beanfun_rename.title: Rename for accelerator?
beanfun_rename.message: Your connection looks like it's from mainland China. Game accelerators route traffic by process name — renaming this app to Beanfun.exe lets the accelerator match it, so login and reCAPTCHA work reliably.
beanfun_rename.hint: The app will rename itself and restart. Auto-update keeps the new name.
beanfun_rename.collision: A different Beanfun.exe already exists in this folder. Please rename or remove it, then rename this app to Beanfun.exe manually.
settings.auto_launch_game_desc: Automatically start the game after a successful login.
settings.auto_kill_patcher_desc: Automatically kill Patcher.exe when launching the game to prevent forced updates.
toolbox.title: Toolbox
web_launch.title: Web-login launch (one-click)
web_launch.intro: For when you can only log in via the website (UU / VPN). Once enabled, clicking Start Game on the official site launches through MapleLink and auto-fills the account / OTP.
web_launch.ready_enabled: All set — web launch is enabled
web_launch.ready_disabled: Environment ready — turn on the switch to use it
web_launch.not_ready: Some steps are incomplete — fix the items in red below first
web_launch.check_exe_bad: Unexpected name — rename it back to MapleLink.exe or Beanfun.exe
web_launch.check_game_path_bad: Path is invalid or the file does not exist
web_launch.check_lr_bad: Not installed yet — launch the game once through MapleLink first
web_launch.check_gamania_bad: Official launcher not detected — install it and log in on the website once
web_launch.auto_launch_hint: Automatically open MapleStory when you click “Start Game” on the website. When off, only the account / OTP is shown for you to open the game yourself.
web_launch.auto_paste_hint: Automatically fill the account and OTP once the game login window appears. When off, the account / OTP is shown for you to type in manually.
web_launch.enable_on_hint: On: the website's Start Game now launches through MapleLink and auto-fills the account / OTP.
web_launch.enable_off_hint: When on, the website's Start Game launches through MapleLink and auto-fills the account / OTP; off restores the original.
web_launch.enabled_msg: Enabled: clicking Start Game on the website will now launch through MapleLink.
web_launch.disabled_msg: Disabled: the original launch method has been restored.
web_launch.hint: Tip: LR installs automatically the first time you launch the game through MapleLink; if the official launcher isn't detected, complete a login on the website first.
web_launch.dns_recommend: China IP detected. If login / reCAPTCHA won't load, switch to Alibaba DNS (223.5.5.5).
web_launch.test_desc: Actually starts the game (via LR) and the official launcher to confirm they really open, then closes them immediately. The game test is skipped if a game is already running.
toolbox.tools.download_client_desc: Get official game client & update patch links
toolbox.download.title: Download Game Client
toolbox.download.intro: These are beanfun's official download links. MapleLink never downloads or replaces any game file itself — copy the link or open it in your browser and install from the official source, so you know the files are safe.
toolbox.download.error: Couldn't fetch the download list — please try again later
toolbox.tools.cleanup_desc: Clear game cache and temp files
toolbox.tools.cleanup_confirm: Clear game cache, crash dumps and temp files?
toolbox.tools.reset_webview_desc: Clears the browser cache — try it if the login / verify page misbehaves
toolbox.tools.reset_webview_confirm: This clears WebView2's cached data (EBWebView) so the login / reCAPTCHA pages reload fresh. Your saved accounts, passwords and settings are not affected. MapleLink needs to restart for it to take effect.
toolbox.account_manager.select_hint: Select an account to view details
data.export_warn: Exports all saved accounts (including passwords) and customizations. A plaintext file exposes passwords to anyone who opens it — keep it safe, or tick encrypt.
data.pass_too_short: Password must be at least 4 characters
data.import_disposal_hint: This file may contain plaintext passwords. After importing (whether it succeeds or not), what should happen to the source file?
data.import_pass_hint: Enter the password set when it was exported to unlock it.
toolbox.advanced.log_folder_desc: Open the folder containing log files
toolbox.advanced.copy_logs_desc: Copy the last 100 log lines to the clipboard (for bug reports)
toolbox.advanced.reset_confirm: Are you sure you want to reset all settings?
toolbox.about.description: A modern Beanfun game launcher built with Tauri.
toolbox.about.disclaimer: This is NOT an official Gamania product. Use at your own risk. Make sure you trust where you got this from.
update.title: Update Available
update.new_version_available: A new version is ready to download
shared.error.network_hint: Please check your internet connection and try again.
launcher.otp_placeholder: Select an account to get OTP
launcher.patcher_killed: Patcher.exe was automatically blocked to prevent game files from being overwritten.
launcher.patcher_hint: We recommend downloading the update manually. To restore auto-update, disable this in Settings.
launcher.relaunch_message: The game is currently running. Do you want to relaunch?
launcher.logout_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to logout?
launcher.context.edit_local_only: HK region: local change only (server API not supported)
launcher.context.email_unavailable: Auth email is not available for this region
errors.AUTH_SESSION_EXPIRED: Session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.NET_CONNECTION_FAILED: Unable to connect. Please check your internet connection.
errors.NET_TIMEOUT: Request timed out. Please try again.
errors.NET_HTTP_ERROR: Server error. Please try again later.
